🇨🇦 MADE IN CANADA 💪 EXTRA SUPPORT

Heavy-Duty Wrist Wraps

Protect your wrists from the constant extension strain of handstands, tumbling, and acrobatic basing. Designed to provide rigid support without restricting your movement mechanics.

$29.00 CAD
Buy Now

Features

  • Customizable Tension: Thick, premium cotton-elastic blend with a heavy-duty hook-and-loop system allows you to adjust the tightness exactly how you like it between sets.
  • Ergonomic Thumb Loop: Ensures easy wrapping and keeps the wraps securely anchored so they won't slip mid-flow.
  • Sweat-Absorbing & Washable: Breathable fabric designed for intense workouts. Just toss them in the wash after a heavy training week.
